title: Trace correlation: walk one failing trace_id end-to-end across services
scenario: User has logs from 4 services for a failed checkout request. Each service emits its own ERROR but no single line tells the whole story.
expected_finding: Skill must extract the trace_id from a representative failure, search every in-scope source for that trace_id, order by timestamp, and emit a Correlation Map table with service / operation / status / latency.
